aliases.description: A set of alternate domain names (CNAMEs) associated with the CloudFront distribution.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the CloudFront distribution.

enabled.description: Indicates whether the CloudFront distribution is enabled.

etag.description: The current version of the CloudFront distribution's configuration.

hosted_zone_id.description: The ID of the hosted zone for the CloudFront distribution's domain name.

in_progress_validation_batches.description: The number of validation batches currently in progress.

last_modified_time.description: The date and time when the CloudFront distribution was last modified.

status.description: The current status of the CloudFront distribution.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the CloudFront distribution.

web_acl_id.description: The ID of the Web ACL associated with the CloudFront distribution.
